title: Wynncraft: R-L-R
description: A resource pack for Wynncraft that replaces the click combo indicators with the traditional R-L letters, stylized to fit the current style!
body:
> Originally created to make the Parasite's QTE easier to read, but current patches uses the letters normally now. Still thought it would be cool to release this for the HUD style!

![R-L-R](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6baf4dea69f13213dc6a0910005b001df4d21dd6.png)

Replaces the spell combo mouse buttons with the traditional L and R with a fresh coat of paint to match the new version more!

<!-- For a more high contrast version, [click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-r-l-r-(high-contrast)). -->

<hr>

This pack needs [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) or alternatives, so you can move it above the **Wynncraft Pack** the server provides.
